steps.title: Compare the two claims
steps.content: The sentence before the blank says Delacroix challenges his own ideas, beliefs, and values no matter the topic. The sentence after the blank restates that he questions his own perspective regardless of subject matter.

steps.title: Signal reinforcement
steps.content: Choice A would introduce a specific example, but the sentence remains general. Choice B would mark a time shift that is not present. Choice D would mark contrast, but the two sentences agree. The needed transition reinforces the previous claim. The answer is C.
